timeline.title: Large Non-Solvency II Firms – Senior Managers Regime – Applications and Notifications

rules.summary: Unless otherwise stated, this Part applies to:
In this Part, the following definitions shall apply:

sections.chapter_title: Application to Perform a Senior Management Function

rules.summary: The PRA directs that a firm must make a PRA senior management approval application in accordance with [2.2](/pra-rules/non-solvency-ii-firms-senior-managers-regime-applications-and-notifications
The PRA directs that a firm must use Form A (long form) for a PRA senior management approval application unless:
The PRA directs that, subject to 2.4 and [2.5](/pra-rules/large
The PRA directs that a firm must not use Form E for a PRA senior management approval application if:
The PRA directs that a firm must not use Form E if the person to whom the PRA senior management approval application relates:
1. (1) The PRA directs that a firm must use Form A (shortened form) for a PRA senior management approval application if:
The PRA directs that the form submitted for a PRA senior management approval application must be accompanied by a statement of responsibilities form or, where a _statement of responsibilities fo

sections.chapter_title: Withdrawal of a PRA Senior Management Approval Application

rules.summary: The PRA directs that a firm withdrawing an outstanding PRA senior management approval application must do so using Form B.

sections.chapter_title: Ceasing to Perform a PRA Senior Management Function

rules.summary: A firm must notify the PRA no later than seven business days after a person permanently ceases to perform a PRA senior management function , using:
1. (1) A firm must notify the PRA as soon as practicable after it becomes aware, or has information which reasonably suggests, that it will submit a qualified Form C in respect of a _PRA senior ma

The PRA directs that if a PRA senior management function holder ceases to perform a PRA senior management function for a firm but continues to perform one or more _PRA senior management functi
